digest.component_or_area: rebar infra docs for OIDC provider + auth_host SSO stack
propositions: Update docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md to document that rebar now owns the GitHub OIDC provider, the wildcard cert, and the auth_host domain-wide SSO stack, linking the ADR and runbook.
Add an ADR under docs/adr/ recording the snap→rebar re-homing decision and its tradeoffs (adopt-vs-teardown, import-not-recreate, name preservation, cookie-secret idiom change, state migration).

Add an SSO operations runbook at infra/runbooks/sso-auth-host.md adapted from snap's auth/RUNBOOK.md covering auth-host architecture, /auth-solutions/* secrets, cookie-signing-key rotation, Google client_secret rotation, and the incident revoke lever.
Scope is documentation only; the terraform and module code land in a separate story.
Runbook's future-subdomain SSO opt-in section is descriptive prose and does not gate this ticket.
